title: dactylorhiza majalis subsp. integrata
intro: Dactylorhiza majalis subsp. integrata, also known as the northern marsh orchid, is a subspecies of orchid native to the northern parts of Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its medicinal properties are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza majalis subsp. integrata include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce swelling and improve overall well-being. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are used to treat conditions such as arthritis, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
